issues.sample: Fuel is leaking from high-pressure fuel pump seeping from the fuel pump. The fuel pump was split in half gas was covering everything. As you can see in the photos, fuel is squirting out of the fuel pump.

narrative.headline: What 2015 Lexus Rc owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 5 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (40% of reports).
